title: Faraway-class scout ship
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Faraway''-class scout ship}}
The '''''Faraway''-class scout ship''' was a spotter ship used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. As a scout ship, it was used primarily for reconnaissance and was loaded with [[Sensor/Legends|sensory]] equipment. It also contained a slot for an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] behind the cockpit.

[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] used a ''Faraway'' when he scouted the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dagro]]. It was destroyed when he was shot down by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]].
